fullList.name: Umbreon V Alt Art
fullList.notes: The grail Umbreon card. Out of print. Deep collector demand globally and in PH. Save toward this — it is the benchmark for the Umbreon lineup.

fullList.name: Mega Gardevoir JP PSA 10
fullList.notes: If you find this slab at 5000 pesos buy immediately. Verify slab label shows SAR 087/063. Market value is 18000 pesos plus. Potential 3-4x flip.

fullList.name: Mega Greninja ex SIR
fullList.notes: The number one chase card of 2026. You already hold Chaos Rising sealed. If you pull this do not sell immediately. Hold 2-3 months minimum. If buying raw from PH seller target under 8000 pesos.

fullList.name: Mega Darkrai ex SIR
fullList.notes: Releases July 17 2026. Buy window is August-September 2026 AFTER launch week hype settles. JP Abyss Eye sealed already trading 30 percent above Chaos Rising equivalents. Darkrai demand is massive.

fullList.name: Palkia VSTAR
fullList.notes: Lowest-entry card in the fast-moving GG tier. Part of the Creation trio with Dialga and Giratina. Save to 7500-8000 pesos budget then buy. GG set is fully out of print.

fullList.name: Umbreon and Darkrai GX Tag Team
fullList.notes: Best grading upside in this budget range. PSA 10 sold $599 in Dec 2025. Tag Team era out of print. Umbreon demand is permanent. Inspect all corners before buying.

fullList.name: Mega Gardevoir ex SIR
fullList.notes: Highest PH demand of all Mega Evo SIRs after Greninja. Gardevoir collector demand is massive in PH. Source from local PH sellers who cracked Ascended Heroes ETBs.

fullList.name: 30th Celebration ETB Sealed
fullList.notes: The most important release of 2026. First-ever simultaneous worldwide release. All-foil packs, new rarity, Pikachu and Mewtwo and Mew. Pre-order at MSRP the moment slots open — likely July or August.

fullList.name: Pitch Black ETB Sealed
fullList.notes: Pre-order NOW before launch premium. Every Mega Evo set has performed. Darkrai as mascot. Buy at retail only — never pay above MSRP.

fullList.name: Pikachu VMAX
fullList.notes: Most universal buyer pool of any card in PH. Pikachu demand is eternal. Out of print. Look for a PH seller pricing slightly under market.

budgetList.name: Umbreon V
budgetList.notes: Strongest card in the 5K-7K range right now. Up +35% in 30 days. Brilliant Stars out of print. Trainer and Umbreon scene artwork. Permanent collector demand. Buy on sight if under 5000 pesos.

budgetList.name: Sylveon VMAX
budgetList.notes: Pairs with TG22 Umbreon V. Same set, same collector audience. VMAX treatment. Eeveelution demand is permanent. Buy Umbreon V first then this.

budgetList.name: Glaceon VSTAR
budgetList.notes: Solid GG buy. Up +13% in 30 days. Crown Zenith out of print. Glaceon demand slightly below Umbreon and Sylveon but real. Best sourced under 4000 pesos.

budgetList.name: Leafeon VSTAR
budgetList.notes: Currently DOWN -14.8% this month. Dip buy opportunity. Dropped from roughly 77 to 65 dollars. GG set is out of print. Only buy if PH seller is below US market.

budgetList.name: Umbreon and Darkrai GX Tag Team
budgetList.notes: Best grading upside in this budget range. PSA 10 sold $599 in Dec 2025. Tag Team era out of print. Inspect all corners carefully before buying.

budgetList.name: Regigigas VSTAR
budgetList.notes: Cheapest GG entry. Pair with Cynthia's Ambition GG59 for a combined 4100 pesos two-card GG position. Slower growth than Eeveelution GG cards.

budgetList.name: Mew VMAX Secret
budgetList.notes: Last card in the Lost Origin TG set. Up +22.3% in 30 days but 30th Celebration in Sep 2026 will have new Mew cards that compete. Only buy if priced 1500 pesos or below.
